titleLanguage.description: The language the user wants to see media titles in

displayAdultContent.description: Whether the user has enabled viewing of 18+ content

airingNotifications.description: Whether the user receives notifications when a show they are watching aires

profileColor.description: Profile highlight color (blue, purple, pink, orange, red, green, gray)

timezone.description: The user's timezone offset (Auth user only)

activityMergeTime.description: Minutes between activity for them to be merged together. 0 is Never, Above 2 weeks (20160 mins) is Always.

staffNameLanguage.description: The language the user wants to see staff and character names in

restrictMessagesToFollowing.description: Whether the user only allow messages from users they follow

disabledListActivity.description: The list activity types the user has disabled from being created from list updates
